name: cointegration
description: Evidence that a linear spread is stationary.

name: hedge_ratio
description: Position ratio that defines the spread between assets.

name: beta
description: Market or pair sensitivity used for exposure normalization.

name: ecm_x
description: Error correction term or adjustment coefficient for asset X.

name: ecm_y
description: Error correction term or adjustment coefficient for asset Y.

name: ecm_strength
description: Magnitude and reliability of error correction.

name: half_life
description: Estimated time for spread deviation to decay by half.

name: hurst
description: Long memory statistic; below 0.5 suggests mean reversion.

name: copula
description: Joint distribution model or copula family fit.

name: conditional_probabilities
description: Conditional probability distortion between observed and expected co-movement.

name: ml_confidence
description: Model-estimated probability or confidence for favorable outcome.

name: profile_match
description: Similarity to historically successful trade profiles.
